From:
Sent:
To:
Subject:
Barbara Woodward 
Fri 28/02/2025 12:24:58 PM (UTC)
Peter Mandelson
Re: Well done 
Peter- my turn to congratulate you and the Embassy. From where I sat, it looked 
like an exceptional diplomatic triumph. Thank you from all of us!
With best wishes,
Barbara
Barbara Woodward | Ambassador and Permanent Representative | UK Mission 
to the United Nations| 1 Dag Hammarskjold Plaza | 885 2nd Avenue | New York 
10017|
CoS: 
PA: 
Private Office: 
From: Barbara Woodward * 
Sent: Wednesday, February 26, 2025 8:29:27 AM
To: Peter Mandelson 
Subject: Re: Well done
Peter- thank you. A great message to start yesterday. The team was delighted to have it. 
Good luck with your visitors this week and many thanks to 
 : I’d be delighted!
With best wishes,
Barbara 
Barbara Woodward | Ambassador and Permanent Representative | UK Mission to 
the United Nations| 1 Dag Hammarskjold Plaza | 885 2nd Avenue | New York 10017|
CoS: 
PA: 
Private Office: 
From: Peter Mandelson 
Sent: Tuesday, February 25, 2025 8:40:00 AM
To: Barbara Woodward * 
Subject: Well done
Magnificent performance by your team in NY. 
And 
 keeps telling me you come across wonderfully on TV ! He hopes you will 
come and visit us.
Very best
Peter

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
